name: Story of Thánh Giong

abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Divine King
abilities.text: Once per activation. When this model would discard a card from its deck using an Insight token, it may instead draw the card.

actions.name: Bamboo Spears
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives a (-) if this model is completely on the friendly table half.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

triggers.name: Puncture
triggers.text: When resolving, this attack receives one additional raise.

triggers.name: Forethought
triggers.text: This model gains an Adaptable token.

triggers.name: "I'll Take You All On!"
triggers.text: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 15 Wp duel or be placed into base contact with this model.

triggers.name: Show of Force
triggers.text: Deal 1 damage to an enemy model within range.

triggers.name: Gift of Knowledge
triggers.text: An ally within 3" gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Heroic Intervention
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Enemy engaged with another friendly model only.
actions.effects: Move all friendly models engaged with the target 5" away from the target. Then, place this model in base contact with the target. This model may declare a (melee) targeting the target.

merge_warnings: Name mismatch: front='Story of Thánh Giong' back='Thành Giong'
